message:
test(fcp-conformance/decode-status): pin DecodeStatus transcript binding + anti-amplification guard (br-6ui4t)

DecodeStatus (fcp-protocol/src/fcps.rs) is the per-progress status the
receiver sends during a symbol transfer. Zero conformance coverage
today. Two normative properties pinned:

1. Transcript binding: every signed field round-trips and every
   tampered field invalidates the signature, so a captured status
   cannot be repurposed onto a different exchange or progress claim.
2. Anti-amplification: DecodeStatus::verify runs validate_hint_bounds
   BEFORE building the transcript so an attacker cannot force a
   multi-MB allocation on every verify call. Pinned pre-transcript
   rejection complements the existing fuzz coverage (panic-freedom).

Adds 15 tests against the public fcp_protocol API:

- round_trip_sign_then_verify_passes
- status_signed_under_one_key_does_not_verify_under_another
- transcript_binds_to_object_id
- transcript_binds_to_zone_id
- transcript_binds_to_zone_key_id (key-rotation defense)
- transcript_binds_to_epoch_id (cross-epoch replay defense)
- transcript_binds_to_recipient_node_id (delivery binding)
- transcript_binds_to_request_nonce (per-exchange replay defense)
- transcript_binds_to_received_unique (progress integrity — stops
  attacker lying about transfer completion)
- transcript_binds_to_needed
- transcript_binds_to_complete_flag (the success signal — flipping
  this would convince sender to stop mid-transfer)
- transcript_binds_to_missing_hint_contents
- transcript_binds_to_missing_hint_presence (Some -> None tamper)
- oversized_missing_hint_is_rejected_pre_transcript
  (anti-amplification guard pinned at MAX_MISSING_HINT_ENTRIES + 1)
- header_field_is_not_part_of_signed_transcript (documented
  context-only separation, mirrors SymbolAck)

All 15 pass locally in <0.01s via cargo test -p fcp-conformance --test
decode_status_signing_conformance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
